lamp.onMessage: Lamps flare to life around you, beating back the gathering dark.
lamp.offMessage: The lamps are snuffed out as the dark recedes.

phaseMessages.stirring: <#gold>The lamps gutter and dim. Far below, something vast draws breath — the dark is stirring.<#reset>
phaseMessages.tide: <#red>The Tide comes in. The dark floods every passage. Seek the light, or be taken by it.<#reset>
phaseMessages.receding: <#cyan>The Tide turns. The dark loosens its grip and begins to ebb.<#reset>
phaseMessages.calm: <#cyan>The abyss settles. The dark has receded — for now.<#reset>

lines: The air thickens and grows heavy, as if the stone were holding its breath.
A low groan rolls up out of the deep and dies away.
The flames lean, guttering, though there is no wind to bend them.
The dark presses close on every side, patient and cold.
Something vast shifts far below, and the black seems to lean nearer.
A current of colder air snakes past, and the hair on your neck lifts.
The silence deepens until you can hear your own pulse in it.
